reference: SO I WENT ROUND ABOUT THE HIGHWAYS OF THE CITY TILL I MET A SWEETMEAT SELLER AND BUYING HIS CLOTHES AND STOCK IN TRADE AND GEAR FOR TEN DINARS DID WHAT WAS DONE
text: So I went round about the highways of the city till I met a sweetmeat seller, and buying his clothes and stocking trade and gear for ten dinars, did what was done.
